bullets.text: The US is reportedly preparing to announce a deal that would allow Saudi Arabia to develop a nuclear program, a move that could raise concerns in Israel and among some US lawmakers.
Donald Trump has threatened to target Iranian bridges and power plants if attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz continue, stating the US will respond to any such incidents.
Seven American aid workers are in quarantine at an Ebola facility in Kenya after traveling from the Democratic Republic of Congo, where they were involved in fighting the Ebola outbreak.
A disability employment agency's impending closure has sparked community action, with locals vowing to fight to keep it open, claiming they paid for its establishment.
The Victorian Coalition has pledged $850 million to construct a new West Gippsland hospital if they are elected in the upcoming November election.
Victorian teachers are scheduled to go on strike today, leading to class cancellations in approximately 1600 government schools.
Google's AI spending surged last quarter, burning through nearly $6 billion in cash, despite its cloud computing division contributing to strong revenue and profits.
Tesla's profits plunged due to discounts on EV models, with the company significantly increasing capital expenditures to accelerate its focus on semiconductors, autonomous taxis, and humanoid robots.
The yen rebounded from a four-decade low against the dollar amid speculation that the Bank of Japan may implement faster interest-rate hikes.
